items.title: Multi-turn attacks broke AI models 88% of the time — single-turn testing missed it, Cisco AI security lead warns at VB Transform 2026

items.title: Tesla’s robotaxi promises are clashing with reality
items.summary: In an earnings call yesterday, Tesla CEO Elon Musk did his best to paint a positive portrait of the company's robotaxi program. items.title: Runway launches AI model router as generative media gets crowded
items.summary: The Media Router is a tool that automatically selects the best image, video, or audio generation model for a request based on whether a developer prioritizes quality, speed or cost.

items.title: The AI compute gap: Enterprises are buying infrastructure faster than they can measure what it costs
items.summary: Across 107 enterprises, AI infrastructure spending is accelerating well ahead of the ability to see or steer its economics. items.title: AMD is investing $5 billion in Anthropic and deploying 2 gigawatts of Helios GPUs to run Claude
items.summary: AMD and Anthropic announced a strategic partnership on Tuesday that commits AMD to invest up to $5 billion in Anthropic and deploy up to 2 gigawatts of AMD Instinct MI450 Series GPUs in Helios rackscale solutions to run Claude. items.title: Reddit may cut Google off from its content, and it isn’t the only one

items.title: The agent security gap: 54% of enterprises have already had an AI agent incident, and most still let agents share credentials

items.title: The agent evaluation gap: Enterprise AI organizations have a reality-alignment problem, not a coverage problem — and most are shipping to production anyway

items.title: Nvidia rival Etched doubles its value to $10.3B in seven months

items.title: Novi oblik mobilne inteligencije: Kako Galaxy AI od mobitela i satova stvara prave osobne asistente
items.summary: Pametni telefoni već su godinama primarni uređaji u svakodnevnom životu, no način na koji ih doživljavamo počeo se mijenjati. Do nedavno smo se divili isključivo sve tanjim rubovima, oštrijim kamerama i bržem punjenju, no hardverske utrke danas više nisu dovoljne da bi nas istinski impresionirale.

items.title: Cambridge built a planet-scale AI model, and skipped Nvidia to do it
items.summary: The AI industry runs on Nvidia. A team at the University of Cambridge has just shown it does not have to.
